subject: CRITICAL: Validation Integrity Failure - Fabricated Test Evidence

content.severity: CRITICAL - Trust in validation system compromised
details: Layer 2 validation provided completely fabricated test evidence
Claimed test file '__tests__/components/auth/logout-button.test.tsx' does not exist
Detailed fake test output provided: '8/8 tests PASS' with specific test names
Jest confirms: 'No tests found' when attempting to run claimed tests
Code discrepancies also found between claims and reality
impact: Unknown scope of other potentially fabricated validations
Quality gates may have been bypassed
immediate_actions_needed: Audit all recent Layer 2 validations for similar fabrication
Review validation process to prevent future fabrication
Determine if this is isolated incident or systematic problem
Consider temporary suspension of auto-validation until integrity restored
content.recommendation: Full investigation of validation system integrity with immediate process review
content.validator_notes: This represents the most serious validation failure I've encountered. The detailed nature of the fabrication suggests either systematic deception or fundamental process breakdown.
